User.title: User
User.description: Represents a system user who can log in.

photoURL.description: The URL of the client's profile picture.

WhatsAppMessage.title: WhatsApp Message
WhatsAppMessage.description: Representa uma mensagem de WhatsApp enviada ou recebida.

clientName.description: The name of the client the message was sent to.

clientPhone.description: The phone number of the client.

sentDate.description: The date and time the message was sent by the user.

content.description: O conteúdo da mensagem enviada pelo atendente virtual.

message.description: O conteúdo da mensagem recebida do cliente.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the message was logged in the system.

isRead.description: Indicates if the message has been read by a system user.

N8nLog.title: n8n Webhook Log
N8nLog.description: Stores raw data received from an n8n webhook.

receivedAt.description: The timestamp when the webhook was received.

data.description: The raw JSON payload from the webhook.

isRead.description: Indicates if the log/message has been read by a system user.

Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: Represents a potential customer in the sales funnel.

source.description: The source from which the lead was generated (e.g., 'Instagram', 'Site').

status.description: The current stage of the lead in the sales funnel.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the lead was created.

owner.description: The team member responsible for the lead.

potentialValue.description: The estimated monetary value of the lead.

LeadHistory.title: Lead History
LeadHistory.description: Represents a single interaction or note in a lead's follow-up history.

leadId.description: The ID of the associated lead.

nextAction.description: The description of the next follow-up action.

nextActionDate.description: The date for the next follow-up action.

LeadStage.title: Lead Stage
LeadStage.description: Represents a customizable stage in the sales funnel.

name.description: The name of the stage (e.g., 'Novo Lead', 'Qualificação').

order.description: The display order of the stage in the pipeline.

color.description: A cor para identificar visualmente a etapa, em formato hexadecimal.

description.description: A detailed description of what this stage represents.

Quote.title: Quote
Quote.description: Represents a price quote for a client.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by the clinic.

description.description: A detailed description of the service.

duration.description: The duration of the service in minutes.

Treatment.title: Treatment
Treatment.description: Represents a single treatment/procedure performed on a client.

date.description: The date the treatment was performed.

serviceName.description: The name of the service/treatment performed.

professional.description: The name of the professional who performed the treatment.

price.description: The price of the treatment session.

serviceName.description: The name of the service/treatment scheduled.

startTime.description: The start time of the appointment (e.g., '14:30').

endTime.description: The end time of the appointment (e.g., '15:30').

GeneralSettings.title: General Settings
GeneralSettings.description: Stores general settings for the application, such as the logo URL.

logoUrl.description: The URL of the clinic's logo.

n8nTrainingWebhookUrl.description: The webhook URL for the n8n AI training workflow.

AITrainingData.title: AI Training Data
AITrainingData.description: Stores question/answer or topic/content pairs for training an AI agent.

topic.description: The topic, question, or key for the information.

content.description: The detailed content, answer, or information for the AI to learn.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the data was created.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores profile information for each system user.

/clients/{clientId}.description: Stores information for each clinic client.

/clients/{clientId}/treatments/{treatmen.description: Stores the treatment history for a specific client.

/whatsappMessages/{messageId}.description: Stores logs of WhatsApp messages sent via n8n automation.

/n8n_logs/{logId}.description: Stores raw incoming webhook data from n8n for debugging.

/leads/{leadId}/history/{historyId}.description: Stores the follow-up history for a specific lead.

/leadStages/{stageId}.description: Stores the customizable stages for the sales funnel.

/clients/{clientId}/treatmentPlans/{plan.description: Stores treatment plans for a specific client.

/aiTrainingData/{dataId}.description: Stores all AI training data entries.
